word: H7823 - שָׁחִיס - shâchîyç - shaw-khece' - Which springeth of the same

sections.paragraph:
Original: סחישׁ שׁחיס

Transliteration: shâchı̂ys sâchı̂ysh

Phonetic: shaw-khece'

BDB Definition:

  1. volunteer grain
    1. grain that shoots up of itself the second year, without replanting

Origin: from an unused root apparently meaning to sprout

TWOT entry: 1484

Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine
